title: Y@rubba`al #3378
definition:
Jerubbaal = "let Baal contend"

 1) name given to Gideon by his father when he destroyed the altar of
    Baal
nasbUsage:

 1) name given to Gideon by his father when he destroyed the altar of
    Baal

    NASB:  let Baal contend, a name of Gideon
